calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-23-2021 Off Calendar

Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Written Stipulation Of All Parties
Off Calendar Nov-22-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF BH FINANCIAL SERVICES, LLC's Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Written Stipulation Of All Parties is GRANTED. No opposition filed, and good cause shown.

The Court signed the proposed order submitted with the moving papers. Plaintiff should prepare and submit a separate judgment. Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
